nasb.text: On the day of the new moon he shall offer a young bull without blemish, also six lambs and a ram, which shall be without blemish.

esv.text: On the day of the new moon he shall offer a bull from the herd without blemish, and six lambs and a ram, which shall be without blemish.

cnv.text: 他要在月朔獻一頭無殘疾的公牛犢、六隻羊羔和一隻公綿羊，都是無殘疾的。

ccb.text: 要在朔日献公牛犊一头、羊羔六只、公绵羊一只，都要毫无残疾。
